summary: Software engineering lead and part-time computer science teacher. I build production software and AI-first interfaces, lead engineers as a manager and tech lead, and teach the next batch of developers on the side.

roles.title: Technical Team Lead
roles.summary: Both people-manager and technical lead for the team, working AI-first.
bullets: Worked as both people-manager and technical lead, a scope usually split across two roles, connecting day-to-day engineering with longer-term architecture.
Manage and mentor a team of engineers and product specialists, working AI-first to ship faster.
Build full-stack solutions (Next, Nest, MongoDB) on AWS microservices.
Made key architectural calls on the architecture team and ran code reviews across engineering to hold a consistent bar for quality and maintainability.
Built solutions for US government and education clients aimed at lowering barriers to employment.
Turned social-impact goals into concrete technical specs, working with product, design, and leadership.

roles.title: College Instructor
roles.summary: Teach software engineering to 100 to 200 students a semester.
bullets: Teach and mentor 100 to 200 students a semester on software engineering, modern frameworks, design systems, and architecture.
Built full-stack web and mobile curricula: Dart, Flutter, Web, React, Vue on the frontend; Node, Express, PHP, MySQL on the backend.
Teach Software Engineering Implementation and Management, connecting theory to real agile practice.

roles.title: Chief Technology Officer
roles.summary: Built a new platform from zero with the CEO and grew the founding team.
bullets: Set the technology roadmap and built a new platform from zero, working directly with the CEO.
Ran the product from idea to launch, hands-on to unblock engineering and ship.
Recruited, scaled, and mentored the founding engineering and leadership team.

roles.title: Director of Information Technology
roles.summary: Co-founded and built the agency's engineering arm.
bullets: Co-founded and built the agency's engineering arm; the team was later acquired by PH Live Music.
Designed technical strategy and system design for greenfield client applications.
Set the initial engineering culture and standards: git-flow workflows and agile tracking.

roles.title: Operations Manager
roles.summary: Built operations from scratch and scaled to onboard a large BPO client.
bullets: Built operations from scratch and scaled infrastructure to onboard and support a large BPO client.
Designed business-process systems that cut operational bottlenecks.
Directed procurement, resource allocation, and cross-functional leadership against client SLAs.
Led go-to-market and marketing during growth phases, connecting operations to business development.

roles.title: Sales and Marketing Lead
roles.summary: Built the first sales and marketing setup and a repeatable pipeline.
bullets: Built the company's first sales and marketing setup from scratch, with a client-acquisition system that gave the business a steady, predictable pipeline.
Started the company's social presence and paid-ads strategy, running the first campaigns to find and convert enterprise leads.
Standardized the sales lifecycle: the sales process, client proposals, and service contracts.
Ran the corporate WordPress site to bring in inbound traffic and leads.
Recruited, trained, and managed a small sales and marketing team, aligned to the company's growth targets.

roles.title: Sales and Marketing Manager, Co-owner
roles.summary: Co-ran a family resort's operations and its whole digital footprint.
bullets: Co-managed resort operations and commercial strategy with family stakeholders, growing bookings and the guest experience across the seasons.
Built the resort's digital footprint from scratch: the official website and a strong organic social presence.
Ran the resort's paid-ads strategy, with campaigns that turned social engagement into steady bookings.
Set up and integrated a central booking system across Airbnb, OTA platforms, and direct channels.

roles.title: Associate Software Engineer
roles.summary: First job, recruited before graduation onto an enterprise software team.
bullets: Recruited in my third university year, before graduation, onto a fast-paced enterprise software team.
Learned production practice: version control, clean architecture, and agile methods.
Worked on core software components and took part in rigorous code review.
Balanced a full course load with the job before shifting to a family business.

notes: President of LOOP, the official Computer Science student organization.
Top 3rd-year student for academic and technical performance.
Best Thesis award for research, architecture, and implementation.
